query:
SELECT 
  pv.id,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.sellingPriceRMB,
  pv.sellingPriceFOB,
  pv.costPriceRMB,
  pv.isDefault,
  p.sku as productSku,
  p.name as productName
FROM product_variants pv
JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
WHERE pv.sellingPriceFOB IS NULL OR pv.sellingPriceFOB = '0' OR pv.sellingPriceFOB = '0.00'
ORDER BY p.sku, pv.variantCode
LIMIT 50;

  pv.variantCode,
  pv.sellingPriceRMB,
  pv.sellingPriceFOB,
  pv.costPriceRMB,
  pv.isDefault,
  p.sku as productSku,
  p.name as productName
FROM product_variants pv
JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
WHERE pv.sellingPriceFOB IS NULL OR pv.sellingPriceFOB = '0' OR pv.sellingPriceFOB = '0.00'
ORDER BY p.sku, pv.variantCode
LIMIT 50;
